offices
(2) Terminal gratuity is in addition to any other gratuity
or other benefit payable under any written law in respect of
the office to which the terminal gratuity relates.
(3) A person shall not be entitled to the payment of
terminal gratuity who ceases to hold the relevant office as a
result of disciplinary action taken against him.
(4) Where a person has been paid terminal gratuity, he
shall not be paid another terminal gratuity notwithstanding
that he has served for a further period in an office specified in
the Schedule
